outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: US eyes potential second round of talks with Iran as blockade takes hold
outlets.summary: CNN covers Trump hinting at Round 2 Iran talks 'in next two days.' Blockade Day 2. Oil settles lower Brent $94.79. S&P 500 erases all war losses. Sanctions waiver expires April 19.

outlets.name: CNBC
outlets.headline: U.S. oil prices fall more than 6% as White House considers further talks with Iran
outlets.summary: CNBC covers oil crash — Brent $94.87, WTI $91.42. Sharpest single-day drop since ceasefire. Pakistan pushing Islamabad Round 2. IEA: March 10.1M bpd lost.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Watchdog blasts BBC, CNN, NYT for applying 'war crime' label almost exclusively to US, Israel
outlets.summary: Fox covers media watchdog report alleging bias in war coverage. Claims 'war crime' terminology applied selectively against US and Israel while Iran escapes scrutiny.

outlets.name: Breitbart
outlets.headline: Iran War Sent Consumer Sentiment Plunging to Record Low
outlets.summary: Breitbart covers consumer sentiment crash to 47.6 (all-time low). Sen. Warner says removing Iran's uranium would take '10,000 troops on the ground.'

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 46 of the US-Iran conflict?
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera Day 47 roundup: Israel-Lebanon talks in DC. Sanctions waiver expiring. CENTCOM blockade holds. IMF/IEA joint warning. First ICRC aid to Iran. 17-nation coalition backs talks.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: The Hormuz Blockade Is as Much About China as Iran
outlets.summary: Bloomberg analysis: 157.7M barrels of Iranian oil on water, 97.6% China-bound. China calls blockade 'dangerous and irresponsible.' Lavrov arrives Beijing to coordinate response.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Mossad chief Barnea: Our mission in Iran is not over until the regime falls
outlets.summary: Times of Israel covers Mossad Director's first public regime-change call. 10 IDF soldiers wounded in Bint Jbeil clash. Katz: uranium removal as war-ending precondition.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Katz defines conditions for end of war; Mossad chief vows Iran regime change
outlets.summary: JPost covers Katz uranium removal precondition. Saudi pressures US on blockade. Italy suspends defense pact with Israel. Pakistan pushing Islamabad Round 2.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran's UN envoy: US naval blockade gross violation of Iran's sovereignty and territorial integrity
outlets.summary: PressTV covers Iran's formal UN letter calling blockade 'illegal act of aggression.' Hezbollah deploys jam-proof drone for first time. 40+ drones hit northern Israel targets.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Hezbollah attacks Israeli military settlements with new optical-guidance drone
outlets.summary: PressTV covers Hezbollah's first use of jam-proof optical-guidance drone. 40+ drones hit 20+ targets across northern Israel. 'Heavy damage' reported.
